subject: npmx Weekly #9
headline: npmx Weekly #9
intro: This week, we made significant strides in enhancing user experience and code quality. Our community continues to engage and contribute, driving forward the npmx project.

topics.title: User Interface Improvements
topics.summary: Multiple pull requests have addressed UI challenges, fixing layout issues on package pages and enhancing mobile menu functionality, resulting in improved accessibility and user experience.

topics.title: Code Optimization and Testing
topics.summary: Optimizations have been made to improve performance, including reducing unnecessary Date object creation and adding new tests for the `useRepositoryUrl` composable, ensuring better reliability.

topics.title: Chart Enhancements
topics.summary: A new split view option for download charts has been introduced, enhancing accessibility for users with color vision deficiency and allowing easier data comparison on the compare page.
